get.summary: Get an existing certificate by id.
get.description: Synchronously returns the requested single certificate

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the existing certificate

patch.description:
Synchronously edits an existing certificate. 
Note: Passing null as the value for a property will remove the existing property value.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the certificate to update

403.description: User does not have an authorized role to perform this action.

post.summary: Create one or more new certificates
post.description:
One or more certificates up to 250 are validated and stored synchronously. If the request is successful, the certificate(s) will be returned. 
If any certificate is invalid (for example name is not provided), then the request will fail.

403.description: User does not have an authorized role to perform this action.

get.summary: Get an existing container by id.
get.description: Synchronously returns the requested single container

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the existing container

patch.description:
Synchronously edits an existing container. 
Note: Passing null as the value for a property will remove the existing property value.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the container to update

403.description: User does not have an authorized role to perform this action.

post.summary: Create one or more new containers
post.description:
One or more containers up to 250 are validated and stored synchronously. If the request is successful, the container(s) will be returned. 
If any container is invalid (for example an invalid lifecycleState is passed), then the request will fail.

400.description: Missing lot.id, material.id, netQuantity, netQuantityUnit, or lifecycleState.

403.description: User does not have an authorized role to perform this action.

get.summary: Get an existing location by id.
get.description: Synchronously returns the requested single location

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the existing location

patch.description:
Synchronously edits an existing location. 
Note: Passing null as the value for a property will remove the existing property value.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the location to update

403.description: User does not have an authorized role to perform this action.

post.summary: Create one or more new locations
post.description:
One or more locations up to 250 are validated and stored synchronously. If the request is successful, the location(s) will be returned. 
If any location is invalid (for example an invalid locationType is passed), then the request will fail.

403.description: User does not have an authorized role to perform this action.

name.description: The human readable unique identifier of the Certificate.

status.description: The lifecycle state of the Certificate.  This value is managed outside of Materials Management and can be entered as freetext.

level.description: The level of the Certificate.  This value is managed outside of Materials Management and can be entered as freetext.

approvedUntil.description: The date until which the Certificate is approved.

externalSource.description: The name of the external inventory system managing this certificate.

externalId.description: The external inventory system's unique identifier for this certificate.

name.description: The name of the sourced or unified material for which this certificate is associated.
The human readable unique identifier of the Certificate.

status.description: The lifecycle state of the Certificate.  This value is managed outside of Materials Management and can be entered as freetext.

level.description: The level of the Certificate.  This value is managed outside of Materials Management and can be entered as freetext.

approvedUntil.description: The date until which the Certificate is approved.

externalSource.description: The name of the external inventory system managing this certificate.

externalId.description: The external inventory system's unique identifier for this certificate.

name.description: The human readable unique identifier of the Certificate.

status.description: The lifecycle state of the Certificate.  This value is managed outside of Materials Management and can be entered as freetext.

level.description: The level of the Certificate.  This value is managed outside of Materials Management and can be entered as freetext.

approvedUntil.description: The date until which the Certificate is approved.

externalSource.description: The name of the external inventory system managing this certificate.

externalId.description: The external inventory system's unique identifier for this certificate.

barcode.description: A unique identifier for the Container that can be scanned. If not provided a barcode will be generated.

expirationDate.description: The date and time at which the Material in this Container will expire.

netQuantity.description: The numeric value for the amount of Material in the Container.

netQuantitySigFigs.description: When applicable, the number of significant figures used to determine the value of netQuantity.

netQuantityUnit.description: The the unit representing the amount of Material in the Container.

tareWeight.description: When applicable, the tare weight of the Container when it is empty.

tareWeightSigFigs.description: When applicable, the number of significant figures used to determine the value of tareWeight.

tareWeightUnit.description: When applicable, the unit representing the tare weight of the Container.

grossWeight.description: The gross weight of the Container, which must equal the sum of tareWeight and netQuantity when provided.

grossWeightSigFigs.description: When applicable, the number of significant figures used to determine the value of grossWeight.

grossWeightUnit.description: When applicable, the unit representing the gross weight of the Container.

openedDate.description: The date and time the container was first opened for dispense.

missingSince.description: When set, the container is considered missing since this date.

catalogNo.description: The catalog number of the package size of this Container, provided by the Material's supplier.

externallyManaged.description: Whether or not this container is being actively managed in another inventory system.  When set to true, this Container is not editable in the Materials Management UI.

lifecycleState.description: The lifecycle state of this container.

externalSource.description: The name of the external inventory system managing this container.

externalId.description: The external inventory system's unique identifier for this container.

name.description: The name of the location. Must be unique per parent location.

locationType.description: The type of location, to be used to describe the location hierarchy.

name.description: The name of the location. Must be unique per parent location.

barcode.description: A unique identifier for the Location that will be generated by the application.

fullPath.description: The computed hierarchy of the current location and all of its parents.

locationType.description: The type of location, to be used to describe the locaiton hierarchy.
